scripts.prebuild: npx lerna exec --ignore aepsampleapp -- rm -rf dist
scripts.build: npx lerna exec --ignore aepsampleapp --ignore aepsampleappnewarchenabled -- tsc
scripts.awesomeproject:ios:build: cd apps/AwesomeProject/ios && xcodebuild -workspace AwesomeProject.xcworkspace -scheme AwesomeProject -configuration Debug -sdk iphonesimulator -destination 'generic/platform=iOS Simulator' -derivedDataPath ./build
scripts.awesomeproject:ios:build:release: cd apps/AwesomeProject/ios && xcodebuild -workspace AwesomeProject.xcworkspace -scheme AwesomeProject -configuration Release -sdk iphonesimulator -destination 'generic/platform=iOS Simulator' -derivedDataPath ./build
scripts.e2e:android:build:release:turbo: cd apps/AwesomeProject/android && rm -rf app/.cxx app/build && USE_INTEROP_ROOT=0 ./gradlew assembleRelease && cd ../.. && ANDROID_CONFIGURATION=release yarn e2e:android
scripts.e2e:android:build:release:interop: cd apps/AwesomeProject/android && rm -rf app/.cxx app/build && USE_INTEROP_ROOT=1 ./gradlew assembleRelease && cd ../.. && ANDROID_CONFIGURATION=release yarn e2e:android
scripts.e2e:ios:build:turbo: cd apps/AwesomeProject/ios && rm -rf Pods Podfile.lock build && USE_INTEROP_ROOT=0 pod install && cd .. && yarn awesomeproject:ios:build && yarn e2e:ios
scripts.e2e:ios:build:release:turbo: cd apps/AwesomeProject/ios && rm -rf Pods Podfile.lock build && USE_INTEROP_ROOT=0 pod install && cd .. && yarn awesomeproject:ios:build:release && IOS_CONFIGURATION=Release yarn e2e:ios
scripts.e2e:ios:build:release:interop: cd apps/AwesomeProject/ios && rm -rf Pods Podfile.lock build && USE_INTEROP_ROOT=1 pod install && cd .. && yarn awesomeproject:ios:build:release && IOS_CONFIGURATION=Release yarn e2e:ios
